scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
scripts.quality: pnpm run quality:knip && pnpm run quality:types && pnpm run quality:lint && pnpm run quality:deps && pnpm run quality:architecture && pnpm run quality:coverage
scripts.quality:deps: dependency-cruiser --config dependency-cruiser.config.cjs packages/core/src packages/node/src packages/cli/src packages/core/test packages/node/test packages/cli/test
scripts.quality:types: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/node/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json
